fact_nuggets.text: Pastel Veil (Japanese: Pastel Veil) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Galarian Ponyta and Galarian Rapidash.
Signature Ability of Galarian Ponyta And Galarian Rapidash

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pastel Veil prevents the Pokemon with this Ability and its allies from being afflicted by poison . It also heals the poisoned status condition of allies if a Pokemon with this Ability is sent out into battle. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Pastel Veil has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pastel Veil prevents the Pokemon with this Ability and its allies from being afflicted by poison . It also heals the poisoned status condition of allies if a Pokemon with this Ability is sent out into battle.
Prevents the Pokemon and its allies from being poisoned.
